┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                 GitHub Actions: Label Automation System                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 1: Enforce Single Status Label (Instant)                      │
│  File: enforce-single-status.yml                                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    User Action: Add status:* label
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ GitHub Event:    │  Trigger: issues.labeled
    │ "issues"         │
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Get Current      │  REST API GET:
    │ Labels           │  /repos/.../issues/4
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Check for Multiple Status Labels │
    │ - status:backlog                 │
    │ - status:done (just added)       │
    │ → Found 2 status labels!         │
    └──────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Validate         │  Transition: backlog → done
    │ Transition       │  Valid next states: ready, development, defect
    └──────────────────┘  ❌ INVALID!
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Remove Invalid   │  REST API DELETE:
    │ Label            │  /repos/.../issues/4/labels/status:done
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Post Error       │  REST API POST:
    │ Comment          │  "Cannot go from backlog → done.
    └──────────────────┘   Valid next: ready, development, defect"
           ↓
    ✅ Only one valid status label remains (<30 seconds)


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 2: Enforce Single Priority/Type Label (Instant)               │
│  Files: enforce-single-priority.yml, enforce-single-type.yml            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    User Action: Add priority:* or type:* label
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ GitHub Event:    │  Trigger: issues.labeled
    │ "issues"         │
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Get Current      │  REST API GET:
    │ Labels           │  /repos/.../issues/4
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Check for Multiple Labels        │
    │ - priority:must-have             │
    │ - priority:could-have (new)      │
    │ → Found 2 priority labels!       │
    └──────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Keep Newest      │  Keep: priority:could-have
    │ Remove Old       │  Remove: priority:must-have
    └──────────────────┘  (No transition validation)
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Remove Old Label │  REST API DELETE:
    │                  │  /repos/.../issues/4/labels/priority:must-have
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Post Informative │  REST API POST:
    │ Comment          │  "✅ Kept priority:could-have
    └──────────────────┘   ❌ Removed priority:must-have"
           ↓
    ✅ Only one label in category (<30 seconds)


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 3: Auto-Label New Issues                                      │
│  File: auto-label-new-issues.yml                                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    New Issue Created
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ GitHub Event:    │  Trigger: issues.opened
    │ "issues"         │
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Get Current      │  REST API GET:
    │ Labels           │  /repos/.../issues/5
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Check for        │  status:* labels present?
    │ Status Label     │  → No
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Add Backlog      │  REST API POST:
    │ Label            │  /repos/.../issues/5/labels
    └──────────────────┘  labels: ["status:backlog"]
           ↓
    ✅ New issue enters workflow (<30 seconds)


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 4: Auto-Close Done Issues                                     │
│  File: auto-close-done.yml                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    User Action: Add status:done label
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ GitHub Event:    │  Trigger: issues.labeled
    │ "issues"         │  Condition: label.name == "status:done"
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Check Issue      │  REST API GET:
    │ State            │  /repos/.../issues/4
    └──────────────────┘  state: open
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Close Issue      │  REST API PATCH:
    │                  │  state: "closed"
    └──────────────────┘  state_reason: "completed"
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Post Comment     │  REST API POST:
    │                  │  "✅ Issue Completed
    └──────────────────┘   Automatically closed (status:done)"
           ↓
    ✅ Issue closed (<30 seconds)


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 5: Auto-Reopen to Backlog                                     │
│  File: auto-reopen-backlog.yml                                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    User Action: Reopen closed issue
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ GitHub Event:    │  Trigger: issues.reopened
    │ "issues"         │
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Get Current      │  REST API GET:
    │ Labels           │  /repos/.../issues/4
    └──────────────────┘  Found: status:done
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Remove Old       │  REST API DELETE:
    │ Status Label     │  /repos/.../issues/4/labels/status:done
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Add Backlog      │  REST API POST:
    │ Label            │  /repos/.../issues/4/labels
    └──────────────────┘  labels: ["status:backlog"]
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Post Comment     │  REST API POST:
    │                  │  "🔄 Issue Reopened
    └──────────────────┘   Reset to status:backlog"
           ↓
    ✅ Issue re-enters workflow (<30 seconds)


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  WORKFLOW 6: Daily Cleanup                                              │
│  File: cleanup-labels.yml                                               │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Scheduled: Daily at 00:00 GMT (cron: 0 0 * * *)
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Fetch All Open   │  REST API GET (paginated):
    │ Issues           │  /repos/.../issues?state=open
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
    │ For Each Issue:                      │
    │ 1. Check for multiple status labels  │
    │ 2. Check for multiple priority labels│
    │ 3. Check for multiple type labels    │
    │ 4. Check for missing status label    │
    └──────────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Issue #4:                            │
    │ - status:backlog ✅ (keep first)     │
    │ - status:ready ❌ (remove)           │
    │ - status:done ❌ (remove)            │
    └──────────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Remove Extra     │  REST API DELETE (for each):
    │ Labels           │  /repos/.../issues/4/labels/{label}
    └──────────────────┘
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────┐
    │ Post Cleanup     │  REST API POST:
    │ Comment          │  "🧹 Daily Label Cleanup
    └──────────────────┘   Fixed violations: ..."
           ↓
    ┌──────────────────────────────────┐
    │ Summary Report:                  │
    │ - Issues checked: 12             │
    │ - Issues fixed: 3                │
    │ - Violations corrected: 5        │
    │ - Clean issues: 9                │
    └──────────────────────────────────┘
           ↓
    ✅ All issues clean (<5 minutes)


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STATUS TRANSITION RULES                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Label State Machine:
    
         backlog
         ├─→ ready ✅
         ├─→ development ✅
         └─→ defect ✅
    
         ready
         ├─→ development ✅
         └─→ backlog ✅
    
         development
         ├─→ review ✅
         ├─→ qa ✅
         ├─→ defect ✅
         └─→ backlog ✅
    
         review
         ├─→ qa ✅
         ├─→ development ✅
         └─→ defect ✅
    
         qa
         ├─→ done ✅
         ├─→ defect ✅
         ├─→ development ✅
         └─→ backlog ✅
    
         defect
         ├─→ development ✅
         └─→ backlog ✅
    
         done
         └─→ (any - on reopen) ✅


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  LABEL CATEGORIES                                                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Status Labels (Mutually Exclusive):
    ────────────────────────────────────
    status:backlog
    status:ready
    status:development
    status:review
    status:qa
    status:defect
    status:done

    Priority Labels (Mutually Exclusive):
    ─────────────────────────────────────
    priority:must-have
    priority:should-have
    priority:could-have
    priority:won't-have

    Type Labels (Mutually Exclusive):
    ─────────────────────────────────
    type:feat
    type:fix
    type:docs
    type:refactor
    type:perf
    type:build
    type:test
    type:ci
    type:revert
    type:chore
    type:style

    Issue Labels (NOT Mutually Exclusive):
    ──────────────────────────────────────
    issue:bug
    issue:story
    issue:epic
    issue:task
    issue:item


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  EXAMPLE USAGE SCENARIOS                                                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Scenario 1: Developer adds valid status label ───────────────────────┐
│                                                                         │
│  1. Developer adds "status:development" to issue #4                   │
│     (current: status:ready)                                           │
│  2. Workflow 1 triggers instantly                                     │
│  3. Validates transition: ready → development ✅                      │
│  4. Removes status:ready, keeps status:development                    │
│  5. Time: < 30 seconds                                                │
│                                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Scenario 2: Developer adds invalid status label ─────────────────────┐
│                                                                         │
│  1. Developer adds "status:done" to issue #4                          │
│     (current: status:backlog)                                         │
│  2. Workflow 1 triggers instantly                                     │
│  3. Validates transition: backlog → done ❌                           │
│  4. Removes status:done, keeps status:backlog                         │
│  5. Posts error: "Cannot go from backlog → done.                      │
│     Valid next: ready, development, defect"                           │
│  6. Time: < 30 seconds                                                │
│                                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Scenario 3: Issue completed and closed ───────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                         │
│  1. Developer adds "status:done" to issue #4                          │
│     (current: status:qa - valid transition)                           │
│  2. Workflow 1 validates and keeps status:done                        │
│  3. Workflow 4 triggers on status:done label                          │
│  4. Issue automatically closed with state_reason: "completed"         │
│  5. Comment posted: "✅ Issue Completed"                              │
│  6. Time: < 30 seconds                                                │
│                                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Scenario 4: Issue reopened after completion ──────────────────────────┐
│                                                                         │
│  1. User reopens closed issue #4 (had status:done)                    │
│  2. Workflow 5 triggers instantly                                     │
│  3. Removes status:done, adds status:backlog                          │
│  4. Comment posted: "🔄 Issue Reopened - Reset to status:backlog"    │
│  5. Issue re-enters workflow from start                               │
│  6. Time: < 30 seconds                                                │
│                                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─ Scenario 5: Daily cleanup fixes violations ───────────────────────────┐
│                                                                         │
│  1. Cron fires at 00:00 GMT                                           │
│  2. Scans all 50 open issues                                          │
│  3. Finds issue #4 with: status:backlog, status:ready, status:done   │
│  4. Keeps first (status:backlog), removes others                      │
│  5. Posts cleanup comment                                             │
│  6. Summary: 50 checked, 3 fixed, 47 clean                            │
│  7. Time: < 5 minutes                                                 │
│                                                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  REQUIRED PERMISSIONS                                                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Repository Settings → Actions → General → Workflow permissions:
    
    ☑ Read and write permissions  ← MUST BE ENABLED
    ☐ Read repository contents and packages permissions only
    
    All workflows use: permissions.issues: write


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  TESTING CHECKLIST                                                       │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    After pushing workflows:
    
    ☐ Test 1: Add valid status transition → Check label enforcement
    ☐ Test 2: Add invalid status transition → Check error message
    ☐ Test 3: Add multiple priority labels → Check mutual exclusion
    ☐ Test 4: Create new issue → Check auto-backlog label
    ☐ Test 5: Add status:done → Check issue auto-closed
    ☐ Test 6: Reopen closed issue → Check reset to backlog
    ☐ Test 7: Trigger cleanup manually → Check violations fixed
    ☐ Test 8: Check Actions logs for errors/warnings


┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  MANUAL PROJECT SYNC (OPTIONAL)                                         │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

    Labels are the source of truth. Project #9 board is optional.
    
    To manually sync labels → project board:
    
    /sync-project
    
    See: .opencode/commands/sync-project.md
         scripts/sync-project-manual.ts
